title: Colourful Planks
description:
Colorful wooden planks that look nice

It's super amazing
body:
![colourful planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b2f1f7011b84d1378da89545cdfeff6e4c6a560.png)

Sick if the bland, less saturated look of all wood planks? Well Colourful Planks gives planks new colourful textures that please your eyes. Works with all wood types including the new: Pale Oak.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44a898778763e37c708daf993df54fe329f9efd9.png) ## All the different colours ![lots of colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b05b8a5fbf2607b480bd5a2e538bc2dce763120.png) ## Works with stairs and slabs ![stairs and slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a44e485f550a26ab180843e3695bd6c124028d.png)
